channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth

item.title: Big oil’s secretive trading arms are having an extraordinary year
item.description:
"Uncover the hidden world of big oil's secretive trading arms in our latest podcast episode. Discover how they're thriving in a volatile market and what it means for the future of energy. Listen now!" (155 characters, including spaces)
Alternatively, a shorter version: "Exposing big oil's secretive trading arms and their surprising success. Listen now!" (126 characters, including spaces)
